bugs.error_message: GET /api/settings exposes all API keys unauthenticated
bugs.root_cause: loadSettings() returned full studio-config.json including all API keys via unauthenticated GET endpoint
bugs.fix: Created safeSettings() that redacts secret values, replacing with configured:true/false

bugs.error_message: reapplySlotMappings runs before extractAndRegisterSlots — renamed slots lose images
bugs.root_cause: Post-processing pipeline ordering: slot mappings were applied before slots were registered
bugs.fix: Moved extractAndRegisterSlots to run first in pipeline, before reapplySlotMappings

bugs.error_message: Parallel build timeout double-increments innerCompleted counter
bugs.root_cause: Timeout handler incremented innerCompleted, then kill() triggered close event which also incremented
bugs.fix: Removed increment from timeout handler — kill() triggers close event which handles it

bugs.root_cause: When multi-page parsing failed, HTML was written directly without calling runPostProcessing
bugs.fix: Added runPostProcessing(ws, ['index.html'], { sourcePage: 'index.html' }) to fallback path

bugs.error_message: gemini-cli stdin consumed twice — prompt always empty
bugs.root_cause: bash $(cat) consumed stdin, then Python os.read(0,...) got empty stdin

bugs.error_message: precommit-security unclosed single quote — security check silently disabled
bugs.root_cause: Missing closing single quote swallowed the pipe and second grep into the regex argument
bugs.fix: Closed the single quote before the pipe
